items.title: Ether, solana, xrp surge up to 10% as majors recover Saturday's war-driven losses
items.whyYouShouldCare: The recovery of major cryptocurrencies, including Solana, indicates a potential rebound in market confidence and liquidity following recent geopolitical tensions.

items.title: Morgan Stanley applies for OCC bank charter to custody crypto
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's move to apply for a bank charter for crypto custody could enhance institutional legitimacy and attract more capital into the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Bitcoin falls with Ethereum and Solana as Mutuum Finance lending protocol advances
items.whyYouShouldCare: The decline in Bitcoin and Ethereum, alongside Solana, suggests a correlation in market movements, impacting liquidity and investor sentiment across the board.
